goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'east' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'price range', and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'norwich' and should 'leave after 08:15'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the east and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi and should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number, price range, and star of the hotel
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to norwich and should leave after 08:15
Make sure you get travel time
